title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!
